overall_justification: While the edition includes some factual reporting, the most prominent articles related to the "Caixa de Conversão" debate clearly advocate for its implementation, albeit with some implicit criticisms of potential mismanagement. The article about valorization and the Jornal do Commercio's stance is a strong endorsement of the expansionist position, directly attacking those who oppose the Caixa and linking them to the manipulation of exchange rates that harm coffee producers.  The criticism of the Jornal do Commercio for opposing the Caixa while seemingly defending the interests of the Banco da Republica and the Treasury further reinforces the expansionist leaning. The emphasis on the need for valorization, regardless of the Caixa, suggests a focus on supporting the coffee sector, a key expansionist concern.

supporting_evidence.quote: Perdeu o tempo o Jornal em sua extensa varia de honlem. Não a víssemos inseria no corpo da respeitavel folha e tomal-a-iamos. cerlamente, por uma encommenda do direclor do Banco da Republica, ancioso, natural menle. por encontrar cobertura para os saques a descoberto, com que, por conta do Thesouro, tem buscado sustentar o cambio, á força.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote, from a prominent article, attacks the Jornal do Commercio's opposition to the Caixa, framing it as a defense of manipulative practices by the Banco da Republica and the Treasury to control exchange rates, a key argument used by expansionists.

supporting_evidence.quote: Pazia-se íigura (que figura ! ?) altean do artificialmente o cambio, e quando vir nham vender os seus produclos os incaulos lavradores, elevava-se a laxa de mais 3lguns pontos, sacrificando, sem misericordia, aquella pobre genlo da qual ainda se iam rir de súcia, uo Caltete, como é notório.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This part of the same article criticizes past manipulations of the exchange rate that harmed coffee producers, reinforcing the expansionist argument for a system that benefits the agricultural sector.

supporting_evidence.quote: Coi..jiaz-se tanto o Jornal em"Invocar, a opinião do Sr. Slciltani». Mas .por qu* não o imita, a esse homem tão devotado' ao nosso paiz"? O Sr. Siciliano não é contrario á caixa; de conversão, embora entenda que no 1 . rvnno os lucros da valorisação pouco.pos- sam influir no cambio.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote, while referencing a seemingly neutral figure (Sr. Siciliano), subtly promotes the idea of the Caixa de Conversão by highlighting that even those skeptical of its immediate impact on exchange rates are not opposed to it.
